case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. GREGORY GEEN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NONSERVICE (RE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT GEEN, GREGORY
